title: [ExportVerilog] Graph region op order creates redundant spills

features.name: redundant wire assignment from input bit extraction
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration and assignment that spills an input bit extraction to a temporary wire, when the input bit could be used directly in subsequent expressions

features.name: bit concatenation from out-of-order input extracts
features.description: Code should include a concatenation that combines input bit extracts where lower bits are extracted after higher bits in operation order, causing the concat operands to be reordered relative to source definition
